testsuite.name: CatalogSyncGatewayImpl - Tests del adaptador de sincronizacion con catalogo

testcase.name: createOrUpdate: sincroniza correctamente cuando catalog responde OK
createOrUpdate: no lanza excepcion si catalog no esta disponible
delete: elimina correctamente cuando catalog responde OK
createOrUpdate: producto con campos null no lanza excepcion
delete: no lanza excepcion si catalog no esta disponible

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-29T00:37:15.907-05:00 INFO 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.d.c.CatalogSyncGatewayImpl : Producto 1 sincronizado en catalog 2026-05-29T00:37:15.914-05:00 WARN 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.d.c.CatalogSyncGatewayImpl : No se pudo sincronizar producto 1 en catalog: Connection refused 2026-05-29T00:37:15.941-05:00 INFO 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.d.c.CatalogSyncGatewayImpl : Producto 1 eliminado de catalog 2026-05-29T00:37:15.944-05:00 INFO 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.d.c.CatalogSyncGatewayImpl : Producto 2 sincronizado en catalog 2026-05-29T00:37:15.947-05:00 WARN 26792 --- [sportshop-admin] [ Test worker] c.s.a.i.d.c.CatalogSyncGatewayImpl : No se pudo eliminar producto 1 de catalog: Connection refused
